manualVerificationSchema.description: 手動確認用欄位。請在 items 內加入要核對的項目，completed=true 代表完成、false 代表未完成。

paths.name: Admin switches to admin list view and opens Admin Panel
paths.semanticGoal: Verify an authenticated admin can land on activities, open the admin-specific list actions, then navigate to Admin Panel successfully.
paths.displaySummary: Admin switches to admin list view and opens Admin Panel｜Verify an authenticated admin can land on activities, open the admin-specific list actions, then navigate to Admin Panel successfully.

items.label: 活動 CRUD（建立/編輯/下架）

paths.semanticGoal: Verify member cancellation succeeds and returning to detail reflects the updated cancellation state.
paths.displaySummary: Member cancels registration successfully and returns to detail｜Verify member cancellation succeeds and returning to detail reflects the updated cancellation state.

items.label: 使用 Email + 密碼註冊
取消報名功能（canceled_at 可為空或有值）
